summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of NRWTreff Everlane-style redesign. All header, hero, footer, and mobile functionality working perfectly with Dark + Neon Cyan + Pink color scheme.
passed_tests: Header top bar: Left nav (STÄDTE, KONTAKT, 18+) working correctly
Header top bar: Center brand (NRWTREFF with ROTZLICHT subtitle) properly styled
Header top bar: Right SUCHE button opens search overlay
Sub-navigation: GIRLS, FKK CLUBS, ROTZLICHT.COM with pink accent on ROTZLICHT.COM
Search overlay opens with input field and Stadt eingeben placeholder
Age verification modal appears and 'Ich bin 18+' button works
Hero headline 'Wo bist du, Süßer?' with cyan color on Süßer
Hero search bar with 'Stadt eingeben' placeholder and SUCHE button
All 3 feature tags: DISKRET, PERFORMANCE, VERIFIZIERT display correctly
Footer large NRWTREFF brand in cyan with ROTZLICHT in pink
Footer newsletter form with email input and GO button functional
Footer Instagram link present and working
Footer legal links: AGB, Datenschutz, Impressum all accessible
Footer disclaimer 'Keine Gewährleistung für Fakes' visible
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes properly
Mobile menu shows all navigation and category items
Mobile responsiveness excellent across all screen sizes
Color scheme consistency: Dark bg (#0a0a0a), neon cyan (#00e5ff), minimal pink (#ff2d7b)
No duplicate elements or layout issues detected
